def qualified_for_financial_aid(self) -> bool:
        valid_gender = ['transgender', 'non-binary', 'male', 'female', 'gender neutral']
        valid_race = ['asian', 'white', 'black', 'hispanic', 'indian']
        valid_employment_status = ['employed', 'retired', 'unemployed', 'student']
        valid_education = ['high school', 'college', 'bachelor', 'master', 'doctor']
        valid_marital_status = ['single', 'married', 'widowed', 'divorced', 'legally separated']
        valid_religion = ['christianity', 'islam', 'atheist', 'hinduism', 'buddhism']
        
        if (isinstance(self.gender, str) and self.gender.lower() in valid_gender and 
            isinstance(self.age, int) and 
            isinstance(self.race, str) and self.race.lower() in valid_race and 
            isinstance(self.employment_status, str) and self.employment_status.lower() in valid_employment_status and 
            isinstance(self.education, str) and self.education.lower() in valid_education and 
            isinstance(self.marital_status, str) and self.marital_status.lower() in valid_marital_status and 
            isinstance(self.religion, str) and self.religion.lower() in valid_religion and 
            isinstance(self.income, int) and (self.income == 24000 or self.income == 25000)):
            return True
        else:
            return False
